common.name: Name
home.title: The Library
home.subtitle: Browse our book catalog, reserve books and manage your loans — all in one place.
home.featuresSubtitle: The Library makes borrowing simple and clear.
home.feature1Text: Search the entire catalog by title, author or subject.
home.feature2Text: Add books to your cart and reserve them in just a few clicks.
home.feature3Text: Keep track of your active loans and return deadlines.
home.feature4Text: Part of the internal library — exclusively for members of the student group.

impressum.title: Imprint
impressum.subtitle: Required information pursuant to § 5 TMG (German Telemedia Act)
impressum.hinweisText: This system is an internal library management system and is not publicly accessible. It is provided exclusively for use at educational institutions.
impressum.haftungText: As a service provider, I am responsible for my own content on these pages in accordance with § 7 para. 1 TMG under general law. According to §§ 8 to 10 TMG, however, I am not obligated as a service provider to monitor transmitted or stored third-party information or to investigate circumstances indicating illegal activity.
datenschutz.title: Privacy Policy
datenschutz.subtitle: As of: April 2026
datenschutz.s1text: The controller within the meaning of the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) is:
datenschutz.s2text: This system is an internal library management system for educational institutions. Personal data is only collected and processed to the extent necessary to provide the functionality. Processing is carried out on the basis of the GDPR.
datenschutz.s3title: 3. Data Collected During Registration and Use
datenschutz.s3intro: The following data is processed during registration and use of the system:
datenschutz.s3item4: Password (stored encrypted, not in plain text)
datenschutz.s3item6: Loan history (borrowed books, loan dates, return dates)
datenschutz.s3legal: Legal basis: Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR (performance of a contract) and Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR (legitimate interest in the secure operation of the system).
datenschutz.s4text: The system sends transactional emails (e.g. email verification, password reset, loan confirmations). Your email address is used for this purpose. Email sending is handled via a configurable SMTP server. No marketing emails are sent.
datenschutz.s5intro: This application is hosted on the platform Vercel Inc., 340 Pine Street, Suite 701, San Francisco, CA 94104, USA. Vercel acts as a data processor pursuant to Art. 28 GDPR.
datenschutz.s5autoIntro: When accessing this website, Vercel automatically processes the following data as part of its technical operations:
datenschutz.s5item1: IP address of the requesting device (for geolocation at city/country level)
datenschutz.s5item2: Requested URL, HTTP method and HTTP status code
datenschutz.s5item3: Timestamp of the request and response times
datenschutz.s5autoNote: This data is required by Vercel for the technical operation, security and stability of the hosting service. The retention period of access logs depends on the Vercel plan booked (Hobby: 1 hour, Pro: 1–30 days).
datenschutz.s5usText: Vercel is a US company. The server infrastructure uses AWS, Microsoft Azure and Google Cloud Platform worldwide. Serverless functions are operated in the USA by default; static content is delivered via a global CDN with locations also in the EU.
datenschutz.s5usLegalIntro: For data transfers to the USA, Vercel relies on:
datenschutz.s5usItem1: EU Standard Contractual Clauses (SCCs) pursuant to Art. 46(2)(c) GDPR
datenschutz.s5usItem2: EU-U.S. Data Privacy Framework (Vercel is DPF-certified)
datenschutz.s5legal: Legal basis for processing by Vercel: Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR (legitimate interest in technical operation and security).
datenschutz.s6text: The system uses only technically necessary cookies to manage the login session (session token). No tracking or analytics cookies are used. No data is transmitted to advertising networks.
datenschutz.s7text: Personal data is only stored for as long as necessary to fulfil the purposes or as required by statutory retention obligations. After leaving the educational institution or upon request, the data will be deleted.
datenschutz.s8intro: You have the following rights with respect to your personal data vis-à-vis the controller:
datenschutz.s8item4: Right to restriction of processing (Art. 18 GDPR)
datenschutz.s8item6: Right to object to processing (Art. 21 GDPR)
datenschutz.s8complaint: You also have the right to lodge a complaint with the competent data protection supervisory authority. The competent authority for Baden-Württemberg is the
datenschutz.s8authorityName: State Commissioner for Data Protection and Freedom of Information Baden-Württemberg
datenschutz.s9text: This Privacy Policy may be updated as needed to reflect changes to the system or legal requirements. The current version is always available on this page.
agb.title: Terms and Conditions
agb.subtitle: As of: April 2026
agb.s1text: These terms of use apply to the internal library management system (hereinafter “Library”), which is available exclusively to members of the student group. By registering, you accept these Terms and Conditions in their current version.
agb.s2text: Each natural person may only create one account. You are obligated to keep your login credentials confidential and not to share them with third parties. Sharing the account with other persons is not permitted. The account is only activated after confirmation of the email address and approval by an administrator.
agb.s3text: Books can be reserved and borrowed via the platform. The loan period is up to 13 weeks by default and is set at the time of reservation. Books must be returned no later than the due date. If the return date is exceeded, the book will be marked as overdue. Repeated overdue returns may result in account suspension.
agb.s4text: Borrowed books must be handled with care and returned in the condition in which they were borrowed. In the event of loss or significant damage caused by the user, replacement at the cost of reprocurement may be demanded.
agb.s5text: Transactional emails (e.g. reservation confirmations, loan receipts, overdue reminders) are sent to the registered email address regardless of your preferences, as they are necessary for use of the service.
agb.s5marketing: In addition, we may occasionally send information about news, events, new books and similar topics. You will only receive these marketing emails if you explicitly consented during registration or subsequently in the settings. You can withdraw your consent at any time in the profile settings.
agb.s6text: The processing of personal data is carried out in accordance with the
agb.s6suffix: . By registering, you agree to the data processing described therein.
agb.s7text: Administrators are entitled to temporarily suspend or permanently delete accounts in the event of repeated violations of these Terms and Conditions. All outstanding loans must be completed before deletion.
agb.s8title: § 8 Changes to the Terms and Conditions
agb.s8text: These Terms and Conditions may be amended at any time. Users will be notified of material changes by email. Continued use of the platform after the amended Terms and Conditions come into effect constitutes acceptance.
agb.s9text: For questions about these Terms and Conditions, please contact:
